q_quant_rationale: The analysis compares observed campaign AOV to an explicit expected range (10-25% lower) given as an organizational baseline, quantifies the deviation as ~23.2%, and the direction (campaign < non-campaign) matches the data.
q_aware_rationale: The analysis correctly reports 12,616.93 JPY (1,834 orders) vs 9,693.25 JPY (484 orders) and delivers a clear verdict that the hypothesis is supported.
